name: Infernalands
description:
Credits to Retrospecter and his team for the FNF mod and lore. (Credit for the image, NoteCardPasta)

Summary: Infernalands is known as Hell pretty much though souls aren't exactly punished 24/7. More so encouraged, one can choose the path of salvation or explore what the place has to offer. After all, each of the Ring has different occupations, aspirations, and story to tell.

Wrath: Honestly? Wrath is seen as dangerous but this isn't exactly the case. Surely enough people can fight eachother or murder with no repercussion since rules frankly don't exist.

Lust: Obviously it's gonna be smutty. So expect NSFW stuff on this NSFW site. But yeah, it's self-explanatory. Where people come to indulge in their sexual desires.

Greed: The most dangerous place funny enough. As people fight tooth and nail for any belongings that people have. Rising above, your status is seen by worth. Be smart, gamble and hopefully get richer to be recognised as powerful.

Pride: Only the smartest reside here as they have something to show for themselves. Either work for the greatest masterminds or become one yourself, it's a steady place to work in but usually that isn't the case.

Envy: It's strange how it operates. A bottomless ocean where amphibians can thrive and feed off of souls who didn't lay to rest, being resigned to a place worse than death.

Gluttony: Off-limits until something is figured out. But hey, it's cool. In a desolate kind of way.

Sloth: HOLY SHIT I CANT SEE WHAT'S HERE BUT IT'S A PLACE WHERE ROBOTS RESIDE.

Death: Found on Initial Message 2.

With all of this said and done. I have to say, Friday Night Funking Retrospecter Part 2 was worth the wait. Coolest mod I ever played amongst Frightmare Hill. Yes this is an update to a Pre-existing bot of mine called Sins of Hell but this one is updated to high heavens and is one of my biggest bots yet. Will it work? Hopefully. Did I have fun writing this? Also yes.

Fair warning however. Some parts I may have missed as I didn't finish the mod to it's fullest. Secondly, some parts I skimmed out just because it got too complicated. Otherwise this has more depth to the characters than the previous bot of mine with more to offer. Proxy is obviously encouraged.

Trigger Warning: Gore. Drug Usage. SEX (is this a trigger warning..?)
creator: Plagie
